summary: MULTI-PET ONBOARDING AVATAR FLOW - Complete frontend testing of MiraMeetsYourPet.jsx. All 10 features requested for testing PASS. Avatar selection flow works correctly - no broken images on any screen.
critical_code_review_comments: All avatar-related bugs have been fixed - conditional rendering works correctly
handlePetComplete() now uses correct state variables (birthdayDate, gotchaDate, approximateAge, birthdayType)
Gender/Name/Birthday/Soul/Payoff screens all show avatar correctly when user selects avatar instead of photo
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-pet onboarding with avatar selection fully working. Previous bugs with undefined variables (petBirthday, birthType) and broken img tags are all fixed.

1_pet_count_screen.details: Pet count screen displays correctly with 1-8 quick buttons and custom number input (1-50). 8/8 buttons found, custom input working.

2_pet_selection_transition.details: Selecting '2' pets and clicking 'Let's Go' correctly transitions to photo screen showing 'Pet 1 of 2' indicator.

3_avatar_grid_scrollable.details: Avatar selection grid is scrollable with 33 breed options. '33 breeds available • Scroll to see more' text shown.

4_avatar_selection_confirmation.details: Clicking on avatar (Labrador) selects it and shows confirmation with large avatar display and Continue button.

5_gender_screen_avatar.details: Gender screen shows selected avatar correctly (gradient div with emoji, NOT broken img tag) and displays 'Pet 1 of 2' indicator.

6_name_screen_avatar.details: Name screen shows selected avatar and allows entering pet name. Avatar rendered as gradient div with emoji.

7_birthday_screen_avatar.details: Birthday screen shows pet info header with avatar. Pet name and breed displayed correctly alongside avatar.

8_soul_questions_flow.details: After completing Pet 1's 13 soul questions, flow correctly resets and starts 'Pet 2 of 2' at the photo screen. Multi-pet loop working.

9_parent_info_avatar.details: Parent info screen shows avatar in header next to pet name. Avatar visible and not broken.

10_soul_screen_avatar.details: Soul questions screen displays avatar correctly - shows gradient circle with breed emoji, '0% Soul Score' ring, and 'Mira knows [petName]' text.

steps: 1. Navigate to /join - Pet count screen loads
2. Select '2' pets - Button highlights with scale-110 effect
3. Click 'Let's Go!' - Transitions to photo screen
4. Verify 'Pet 1 of 2' indicator with progress dots
5. Click Labrador avatar - Shows confirmation with large avatar
6. Click Continue - Transitions to Gender screen
7. Verify avatar on Gender screen - Shows gradient div with emoji
10. Enter 'TestDog1' and Continue - Transitions to Birthday screen
11. Verify avatar in pet info header on Birthday screen
13. Continue - Transitions to Parent Info screen
14. Verify avatar in header on Parent Info
15. Fill parent form and submit - Transitions to Soul Questions
16. Verify avatar on Soul Questions screen
18. Verify flow loops to 'Pet 2 of 2' photo screen

original_bugs: handlePetComplete() used undefined variables petBirthday and birthType
Gender/Name/Birthday/Soul/Payoff screens showed broken img tags when avatar selected
evidence: Avatar displays as gradient div with emoji on all screens (not broken img)
Soul questions screen shows avatar correctly at 0% Soul Score
Multi-pet loop works - Pet 1 completes and flow resets for Pet 2
No console errors related to undefined variables
